content.scenarioHint: 你在火车站询问下一班去上海的列车时间及是否为高铁，希望找到下午3点后出发的车次
expectedAnswers: What's the next train to Shanghai after 3 PM?
Do you have any high-speed trains departing after 3:30?
Is there a fast train to Shanghai around 4 o'clock?
Could you tell me the departure time of the next high-speed train to Shanghai?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了去上海的列车时间和车次类型
语言准确性：时间表达（after/around）和词汇（high-speed/fast train）使用正确
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，避免生硬或过度正式的表达

content.speakerText: Do you have any trains to Guangzhou before 12 PM?
content.speakerTextCn: 有中午前去广州的火车吗？
expectedAnswers: We have a fast train after 10:45.
The next one is at 11:30 — is that okay?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应了对方对'before 12 PM'的询问
语言准确性：使用了正确的时态和介词（around/after）
表达自然度：语气自然，符合日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：包含train/fast/before/around等场景关键词
